_doc: First-launch & global defaults. SaveManager._seed_first_launch_defaults() reads these only when no save file exists (fresh install). Once a save file is written, player's saved values win. Wired keys: starting_balance, default_speed, default_denomination_index (via balance.json), default_mode, default_machine, default_locale, default_theme, first_gift_delay_hours. show_speed_button & show_double_button are read at every game-screen build. tutorial_enabled is reserved (no tutorial system yet).
